input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.2.8.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.2.8.4
            TITLE: the head restraint, attachment and mounting must be strong enough to withstand a

            CONTENT:
            rule T.2.8.4: The Head Restraint, attachment and mounting must be strong enough to withstand a
T.2.8.4 The Head Restraint, attachment and mounting must be strong enough to withstand a 
minimum force of: 
a. 900 N applied in a rearward direction 
b. 300 N applied in a lateral or vertical direction

final_answer: T.2.8.4: The Head Restraint, attachment and mounting must be strong enough to withstand a minimum force of: a. 900 N applied in a rearward direction b. 300 N applied in a lateral or vertical direction
